payload.answer: I can’t determine which specific AI-memory articles you saved because the input does not include their names/identifiers or a saved-articles list—only that such an AI memory article exists.

entity_resolution.reason: The fixture input mentions that an 'AI memory article' exists among several record types, but it does not include article titles, identifiers, or a list of saved AI memory articles.

payload.intent: recall_synthesizer: What articles have I saved about AI memory?

details: No article titles or IDs were present in the provided fixture input.

repair_options: Provide the saved articles list (titles/URLs/IDs) from the memory system.
Include the stored record contents that correspond to 'AI memory articles' so they can be enumerated.
Indicate whether the 'AI memory article' is the only saved item or if multiple articles are stored (and their metadata).
